$comment: Internal record schema. Placeholder NSID root (ARCHITECTURE.md §5). One record per character per chapter beat, sourced from chapter frontmatter registers. createdAt is set to storyDate so records sort chronologically (§8). The register enum matches the kit's default vocabulary — if your voice guide defines a different one, change it here, in the matrix, and in frontmatter together.
title: character.stateEvent

registerExpr.$comment: Full register expression as authored, e.g. a transition 'private -> under-pressure'.
